hero.heading: Performance-informed apparel built for daily standards.
hero.text: Shop the current collection with the same discipline, restraint, and durability that defines AREN.

collection_grid.hero_copy: Performance-informed apparel built for daily standards, not trends.

philosophy_columns.title: Daily Wear
philosophy_columns.description: Structured comfort for transition and recovery days.

collection_grid.empty_description: This layout is ready for your real catalog.
why_paragraphs: AREN apparel exists as an extension of the athlete's standard.
Not driven by seasonal trends or streetwear cycles, but by discipline, restraint, and functional precision.
Every piece is designed to hold up under training and carry that same standard into the rest of life.
This is not clothing for spectators.
collection_grid.why_emphasis: It's equipment for people who operate.

meta_blocks.label: Quality Standard
meta_blocks.text: Built to last. Every piece carries the AREN standard.
